uplink.description: periodic frame: 23.0 C, 45.5 %RH, button not pressed (all non-temp/humidity sensors absent)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds periodic frame (product 0xA9 FEEL, message 0x01). temp code 530 -> 23.0 C, hum code 455 -> 45.5 %RH; co2/covt/luminosity/noise/occupancy/IAQ fields set to sentinel (sensor absent), matching the FEEL's temperature+humidity-only sensor set. expected.data authored from the FEEL frame layout and confirmed against reference/upstream-codec.js.

uplink.description: periodic frame: -15.0 C, 80.0 %RH, button not pressed
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame exercising a negative temperature: temp code 150 -> 150/10 - 30 = -15.0 C, hum code 800 -> 80.0 %RH. expected.data confirmed against reference/upstream-codec.js.

Synthetic in-bounds frame exercising the button-press flag and a one-decimal humidity: temp code 700 -> 40.0 C, hum code 123 -> 12.3 %RH, button bit set. expected.data confirmed against reference/upstream-codec.js.

uplink.description: periodic frame: temperature sensor deactivated (sentinel), 50.0 %RH only
uplink._note: Synthetic frame with the temperature field at the 1021 'deactivated' sentinel (suppressed) and hum code 500 -> 50.0 %RH. Verifies sentinel suppression; upstream reports temperature as 'Desactivated sensor' for this input.
Same payload with the product byte changed from 0xA9 (FEEL) to 0xAB (MOVE) to exercise the product guard.
